message.content:
@startuml
!theme base
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
}

class "DrawingObject" {
  [C] DrawingObject
  virtual void Draw()
}

class "Circle" {
  [C] Circle
  override void Draw()
}

class "Square" {
  [C] Square
  override void Draw()
}

class "Line" {
  [C] Line
  override void Draw()
}

class "Rectangle" {
  [C] Rectangle
  new void Draw()
}
